steps.title: Interpret the function notation F(4) = 28
steps.content: In the context of F(m) = 7m, the statement F(4) = 28 means we are evaluating the function at $m = 4$ kilograms. The result is 28 newtons. In context: the input is mass 4 kg, and the output is force 28 N.

steps.title: Match the interpretation to the correct choice
steps.content: We established that when the mass is 4 kilograms, the force is 28 newtons. Looking at the choices, choice A states: The estimated force acting on an object with a mass of 4 kilograms is 28 newtons. This exactly matches our interpretation. That matches choice A — A is correct.
